summary_one_line: A well-formed XML comment opener <!-- whose body contains a literal 0x09 tab byte, so the loop's third disjunct fires.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A comment body (after a <!-- opener) containing a literal 0x09 tab byte at a position not already matched by the >0x2D or 0x20..0x2C disjuncts, i.e. the byte must equal exactly 0x09.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: All five winner-resolving seeds are naive_ctx and carry 0x09 bytes interleaved with the comment opener (e.g. seed 1 has bytes '09 09' at 0x07-0x08 and a '<!--------' run followed by '09 09 09'); context-sensitive coverage lets naive_ctx retain the intermediate seeds that built this <!--+tab structure as new (call-context, edge) coverage.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Plain naive shares the identical havoc/token mutator set but only a bare per-edge bucket, so the partial-progress comment seeds collapse to already-covered edges and are discarded; the loser-blocking naive seeds contain '--' runs but no 0x09 tab inside a comment body, so L4985 is taken only on its False side (T=0).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: context-sensitive coverage: naive_ctx's CtxHook folds the caller chain into the edge-map index, so reaching xmlParseComment's content loop via a new call path counts as new coverage and preserves the staging seeds that bare naive throws away.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The same gate: a <!-- comment opener (the '-' = 0x2D comparand) plus a literal 0x09 tab byte in the comment body satisfying *in == 0x09.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: cmplog adds I2SRandReplace, which reads the post-execution CmpLogObserver buffer and substitutes intercepted CMP operands (the 0x2D '-' opener bytes and the 0x09 loop comparand) at matching input offsets, letting it place the exact tab byte that opens the True side.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: naive has no CMP interception and no I2SRandReplace, so it must stumble onto the exact 0x09 byte inside a valid comment by blind havoc; its blocking seeds never form a comment body carrying a tab and stay on the False side (cmplog resolved 8/10, naive only 2/10).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: input-to-state substitution: I2SRandReplace splices the logged comparand byte (0x09 / 0x2D) into the matching input offset, supplying the byte-exact tab the comment-content loop tests for.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A byte-exact tab (0x09) preserved inside a concrete <!-- comment body; the gate rewards a specific literal byte rather than a generalizable structural token.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: cmplog keeps the concrete bytes its I2S stage placed, so the exact 0x09 survives and the True side fires (resolved 8/10).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: grimoire runs the same I2S stage but its GeneralizationStage replaces concrete byte runs with <GAP> placeholders and spends extra re-execution validating those generalizations; for a byte-exact 0x09 gate the generalized tokens erase the specific tab and the throughput tax leaves grimoire blocked 9/10 — both loser-blocking grimoire seeds were produced by Grimoire structural mutators (GrimoireExtensionMutator).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: grimoire structural (anti-direction): grimoire's GeneralizationStage + structural mutators abstract away the concrete tab byte and add re-execution cost, so the structural technique HURTS on a byte-exact literal gate where plain cmplog's concrete bytes win.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the third disjunct *in == 0x09 of the comment-content while loop, whose globally blocked side is True.
0x09 is below the 0x20 lower bound of the second disjunct, so the byte must be exactly a tab to reach the True side.
naive_ctx is the winner and naive the loser in the ctx_coverage pair, with naive_ctx resolving 10/10 and naive only 2/10.
Winner-resolving seeds are all naive_ctx and carry 0x09 tab bytes alongside comment-opener bytes.
Loser-blocking naive seeds contain '--' runs but the dumped bytes show no tab inside a comment body.
naive_ctx's CtxHook folds the call context into the edge-map index so the same edge is recorded at different slots per call path.

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog adds I2SRandReplace which scans the input for an operand and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog beats naive on the I2S delta, resolving 8/10 vs naive's 2/10.
naive has no I2S and only havoc+token mutators.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: **Observed `mutation_op` in seed metadata**: any of the above. No I2S.

evidence_trail.claim: grimoire loses to cmplog despite both running the I2S stage; grimoire adds GeneralizationStage and Grimoire mutators.
grimoire's GeneralizationStage replaces concrete byte runs with <GAP> placeholders by repeated re-execution.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: replaces concrete byte runs in a corpus entry with `<GAP>` placeholders

evidence_trail.claim: grimoire incurs extra executions during generalization, each gap validated by a re-run.

evidence_trail.claim: The loser-blocking grimoire seeds were produced by Grimoire structural mutators.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Top-level mechanism is the highest-prob_div pair (naive_ctx>naive, prob_div=0.80, ctx_coverage), which needs no lineage check. For the I2S hypothesis I ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 6597 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 1` and `more-seeds --role W`: the DB stores only naive_ctx winner seeds (seed_bisect lex-min picked naive_ctx, not cmplog), so no cmplog ancestor chain exists to inspect for I2S-floor dash rows; I2S contribution to the cmplog>naive pair therefore remains unverified in lineage and rests on the mechanism paragraph plus the 0x09/0x2D CMP-operand match.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic comment-content gate testing a byte-exact 0x09 tab where cmplog does NOT outpace naive, and grimoire matches or beats cmplog, and naive_ctx shows no advantage over naive — i.e. all three deltas vanish, showing the divergence is not technique-driven.

weakest_evidence_point: The cmplog>naive I2S attribution is unverified in lineage because only naive_ctx winner seeds are stored, so I2S's role rests on mechanism reasoning rather than a confirmed dash-row ancestor.
